category_sources: source_facts.description: UDP-based SSH server with roaming support.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official project documentation site; official GitHub README is a secondary official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/trzsz/tsshd; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and source_facts.executables identify a UDP-based SSH server/daemon with roaming support.
